title: Monday.com forms 'Other' option
excerpt: I’m setting up a Form with some single-select questions. I’m not seeing ‘Other’ as an option to add where someone can type in a response instead of picking the pre-selected responses. Wondering if I’m missing something?

posts.author: culturehousecc (CultureHouse)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m setting up a Form with some single-select questions. I’m not seeing ‘Other’ as an option to add where someone can type in a response instead of picking the pre-selected responses. Wondering if I’m missing something?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @culturehousecc - you can add “other” as an option then have a text/long text question to get the free-form response. Just setup a condition on the single-select option to show the text question when it equals “Other”.

Hope this helps!
Mark
